scenarios.title: [LOGIN-1] - Check that valid credentials reach the secure area @positive @e2e
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to the login page, fill username and password from env vars, click the submit button, and verify the secure area is reached with a flash success message and visible logout control.
expectedAssertions: Flash success message is visible and contains text matching /you logged into a secure area/i

locatorTable.notes: Label association inferred from standard HTML login form. Fallback: page.locator('#username') HIGH. Resolved by Q1.
Same assumption as username. Fallback: page.locator('#password') HIGH. Resolved by Q1.
Button role confirmed from HTML tag. Accessible name /login/i guessed from form context; unconfirmed without DOM snapshot. Fallback: page.locator('button[type="submit"]') HIGH. Resolved by Q2.
Direct CSS-class mapping per hallucination-defense rule (no role invented without ARIA evidence). Upgrade candidate: page.getByRole('alert') LOW — requires Q3 resolution.
Link role confirmed from <a> HTML tag. Accessible name /logout/i inferred from source assertion .should('contain', 'Logout'). Fallback: page.locator('a.button.secondary') HIGH. Resolved by Q4.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved: <label for='username'> association assumed — no DOM snapshot present.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If no label association exists in the DOM, use page.locator('#username') and add WHY-comment 'Q1 unresolved: label not confirmed'.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved: <label for='password'> association assumed — no DOM snapshot present.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If no label association exists in the DOM, use page.locator('#password') and add WHY-comment 'Q1 unresolved: label not confirmed'.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q2 unresolved: button accessible name assumed to contain /login/i — actual button text not confirmed without DOM snapshot.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If button text differs (e.g. 'Sign In', 'Submit'), update the name regex. If locator resolves zero elements, fall back to page.locator('button[type="submit"]').

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q4 unresolved: accessible name assumed to contain 'Logout' from source assertion text — no DOM snapshot to confirm aria-label overrides.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If accessible name does not match /logout/i, adjust regex or use page.locator('a.button.secondary') with WHY-comment 'Q4 unresolved: accessible name not confirmed'.
